ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in millibars */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover as a percentage */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection method used */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the station was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "data_query" TEXT /* Query used to generate the visualization data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "data_query" TEXT /* Query used to generate the requested data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data request associated with the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the export was made */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the export was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the export was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_data" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the collected data (e.g., 1 = good, 2 = fair, 3 = poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the weather event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the weather event */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the weather event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_event_impacts" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather event causing the impact */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector affected by the impact (e.g., agriculture, transportation) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "damage_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the damage caused by the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_event_impacts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)
